name: Lemon/Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Stir in the lemon juice and grated lemon rind.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the cake flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Mix in the chopped raisins.
7. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently until smooth.
8. Roll the dough into a rectangle about 1/8 inch thick.
9. Cut the rolled dough into cookies using a floured cutter.
10. Place the cookies on an oiled baking sheet.
11. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
